channel.title: SoundSpice on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in SoundSpice on Tech Tracker

item.title: SoundSpice - An open source Intuitive music player!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-axvH4KO0LDU/YS-277RyyAI/AAAAAAAAGiY/on7-qainBDMflcdLEMyHez4wwxIqLfkaQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1630516970364704-0.png" alt=""> It is known fact music listening is part of life everyday most people listen music to enjoy or relax as in olden days peope used to listen music by attending concerts later we got TV’s & radio after that we got ipods and walkmans to listen music and now we are in the era of smartphones and you just need that to listen unlimited music easily by simply installing a music player app.
